name: gashuna-hotel
description: Gashuna Hotel Management System — Dangla, Awi Zone, Amhara Region, Ethiopia
author: Gashuna Hotel

scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
